description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. The front entryway is accessible via a short flight of steps, flanked by two palm trees and a driveway with a parked car. The house includes a spacious outdoor terrace with seating and greenery, as well as a swimming pool visible from the upper level. The rear and side views reveal additional patio areas and more landscaping, emphasizing outdoor living spaces. The overall structure is boxy and minimalist, with smooth surfaces and a focus on open, airy layouts.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a front entryway with steps, and outdoor living spaces including a terrace and pool. The design is minimalist and geometric, with palm trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, two palm trees, a driveway with a car, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terrace, outdoor seating, and additional landscaping, with the pool visible inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with symmetrical windows and a large patio area.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the flat roof, pool, and the layout of interior rooms and outdoor spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat door, short steps, flanked by palm trees, and a simple, clean facade.
